rule_text: AP contractor registration past-experience minimums by class (Annexure-III): single executed work value in last 5 years — Special Class >= Rs.50 lakh; Class-I >= Rs.10 lakh; Class-II >= Rs.4 lakh; Class-III >= Rs.3 lakh; Class-IV >= Rs.1 lakh; Class-V no monetary minimum but applicant must have worked as agent/employee under registered Class-I contractor with certificate.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-III, Section B(i)
verification_method: Check bidder past-experience certificate value matches class threshold from any one year in last 5 years; reject if undersized for claimed class

rule_text: AP Public Health Engineering contractor must have plumbing license OR a licensed plumber in employment engaged on the work; Electrical contractor must himself be licensed OR employ a licensed electrician engaged on the work.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-III, Section VI (Other Requirements)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works] AND Category IN [PublicHealthEngineering, Electrical]
verification_method: Check tender requires licensed plumber/electrician employment proof for matching categories

rule_text: AP Transport Contractors must own (in their own name per RC book) at least: Class-III 1 vehicle, Class-II 2 vehicles, Class-I 3 vehicles — capable of carrying construction materials and long structures; vehicles must NOT be sold/transferred during contract — if done, registration deemed automatically withdrawn.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-III, Section VII (Transport Contractors)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works] AND Category=Transport
verification_method: Check transport contractor RC books match class minima; flag any mid-contract vehicle transfer triggering deemed-withdrawal of registration

rule_text: AP Fabrication and Erection of Structural Steel Contractors: Class-III must have basic lifting tackles (tripods, sheaves, pulleys); Class-II must additionally have winches + 20-ft single derrick; Class-I must additionally have welding set + qualified welder + hydraulic jacks + sleepers + 15-20 tonne mobile crane AND must be partner/Director of a Registered Structural Factory under Factories Act 1948.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-III, Section VIII (Structural Steel Contractors)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works] AND Category=StructuralSteelFabrication
verification_method: Check structural-steel contractor's equipment list and Factory-Act registration matches the class hierarchy

rule_text: Solvency Certificate for AP contractor registration must be on prescribed proforma — issued by Tahsildar (Annexure V(a) form) OR Scheduled Bank (Annexure V(b) form); free-form solvency letters are NOT acceptable.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-V(a) and V(b)
verification_method: Check solvency cert matches one of the two prescribed proformas (Tahsildar or Scheduled-Bank); reject deviating formats

rule_text: AP contractor registration application requires 8 documents: (i) Application proforma with Rs.2 court fee stamp, (ii) registration fee challan/DD, (iii) Solvency Certificate (Tahsildar or bank), (iv) past-5-years works list certified by EE-rank+, (v) latest Income Tax + Sales Tax Clearance Certificates (no exemption — even Cooperative Societies), (vi) partnership deed copy if applicable, (vii) Form C from Registrar of Firms if applicable, (viii) Engineering Degree copy if degree-holder.
verification_method: Check bidder registration file contains all 8 mandatory documents; reject if any missing
